creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've tried your reproducer, but it doesn't crash for me at all.  I ran this on 12.0-CURRENT r315331 amd64, using clang 3.6.1, 3.7.1, 3.8.0, 3.9.0, 3.9.1 and 4.0.0.

Maybe your clang executable is bad somehow, for example it could have been compiled for an incompatible CPU?  Can you run it in a debugger, or under valgrind, to see a stack trace?
